title: And Yet, You Are So Sweet
original_title: なのに、千輝くんが甘すぎる。
overview: Kisaragi Maaya, 16 years old. The first love confession of her life ended in complete rejection. She vows to "never confess to someone again" in the presence of the stoic but popular Chigira-kun, while on library duty together one day.
